text: Officer Jones here, so the attendant that we drive through was concerned about your well-being. He thought you might be impaired or out of the influence of something. Maybe you realize your sunglasses are on upside down? Yeah, they're upside down. On a scale of zero to ten and zero being you're completely sober and ten being your pass-up. You can drop where you can grab.
